title: vigna unguiculata var. stenophylla
intro: Vigna unguiculata var. stenophylla, also known as the narrow-leaved cowpea or African cowpea, is a variety of the cowpea plant native to West Africa. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Vigna unguiculata var. stenophylla include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce cholesterol levels, and alleviate symptoms of diabetes. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or capsules, and is also used in traditional cooking as a source of protein and fiber.
